meta.title: Toolando — Your online tools in one place
meta.description: Converters, generators, PDF and AI tools — all in one elegant ecosystem. Fast and simple.

hero.subtitle: Converters, generators, PDF, AI — all in one ecosystem.

opener.title: Universal file opener
opener.subtitle: Open and preview literally any file format directly in your browser — no installation and no uploading your data to a server.

ai.title: Intelligent AI tools
ai.subtitle: Write, summarize, translate and create images with the latest AI models — right inside Toolando, no installation needed.

features.title: Most popular tools
features.subtitle: The most-picked Toolando tools — ready to use in seconds.
features.popularSubtitle: The most-used conversions — both directions, ready to go.

categories.title: Tool categories
categories.subtitle: Pick a category to see all available converters.

why.title: Why Toolando?
why.subtitle: Built with your productivity and comfort in mind.
why.speedDesc: Tools run instantly in your browser — no waiting and no installation.
why.simpleDesc: A clean interface where you find any tool in seconds.
why.toolsDesc: A huge set of converters, generators and AI tools in one place.

ctaSection.title: Start using Toolando today
ctaSection.subtitle: Join an ecosystem of tools that save you time every day.

support.title: Help keep Toolando going
support.subtitle: Toolando is built and offered for free. If it saves you time, consider supporting its development.
support.thanks: Every contribution helps cover servers and keeps new tools coming.

openerPage.title: Universal file opener and converter
openerPage.subtitle: Open literally any file format — images, video, audio, PDF, documents, code and data show up instantly. Once opened, Toolando immediately suggests every sensible format you can convert the file to with one click.
openerPage.drop: Drag and drop a file here
openerPage.noConverter: We don't have a converter for this format yet — but you can still preview and download the file below.
openerPage.downloaded: Done! The file has been downloaded.
openerPage.previewUnavailable: Preview is not available for this format.
openerPage.binaryNote: Binary (hexadecimal) preview of the first bytes of the file.

tool.drop: Drag and drop a file here
tool.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
